en.text: sometimes (with the article inserted) ; with H0376 inserted (1 Samuel 9:1) ; son of a man of Jemini; or shortened ; (1 Samuel 9:4; Esther 2:5) a man of Jemini, or (1 Samuel 20:1) simply xlit Yᵉmînîy corrected to Yᵉmîynîy; a Jeminite; (plural) xlit Bᵉnîy corrected to Bᵉnêy; patron from H1144; a Benjaminite, or descendent of Benjamin
